name: embed-google-photos
description: Embed stunning Google Photos galleries directly into your WordPress site with the Google Photos Block plugin.

scripts.i18n: npm run i18n-pot && npm run i18n-json && npm run i18n-mo
scripts.zip: npm run build && npm run i18n && npm run find-ds && rm -f embed-google-photos.zip && zip -r embed-google-photos.zip embed-google-photos.php GoogleAPI assets build languages readme.txt -x '*.DS_Store'

author: bPlugins
